# Test: Non-Breaking Changes (US3)
# Validates that non-breaking changes (adding optional fields) are allowed.
#
# Prerequisites: k3d and Gitea running (handled by TestE2E)
# Environment: GITEA_URL, GITEA_TOKEN, E2E_CLUSTER are injected by test runner

# Step 1: Create app with proto module
mkdir app
cd app
exec git init
exec git config user.name 'E2E Test Bot'
exec git config user.email 'e2e@example.com'
exec apx init app --org=testorg --repo=test-app --non-interactive internal/apis/proto/nonbreak/v1
exists internal/apis/proto/nonbreak/v1/nonbreak.proto

# Create first commit as baseline
exec git add .
exec git commit -m 'Initial schema v1.0.0'
exec git tag proto/nonbreak/v1/v1.0.0

# Step 2: Make a non-breaking change (add optional field)
exec sh -c 'echo "syntax = \"proto3\";" > internal/apis/proto/nonbreak/v1/nonbreak.proto'
exec sh -c 'echo "" >> internal/apis/proto/nonbreak/v1/nonbreak.proto'
exec sh -c 'echo "package nonbreak.v1;" >> internal/apis/proto/nonbreak/v1/nonbreak.proto'
exec sh -c 'echo "" >> internal/apis/proto/nonbreak/v1/nonbreak.proto'
exec sh -c 'echo "message TestMessage {" >> internal/apis/proto/nonbreak/v1/nonbreak.proto'
exec sh -c 'echo "  string id = 1;" >> internal/apis/proto/nonbreak/v1/nonbreak.proto'
exec sh -c 'echo "  string name = 2;" >> internal/apis/proto/nonbreak/v1/nonbreak.proto'
exec sh -c 'echo "  string optional_description = 3; // non-breaking addition" >> internal/apis/proto/nonbreak/v1/nonbreak.proto'
exec sh -c 'echo "}" >> internal/apis/proto/nonbreak/v1/nonbreak.proto'

exec git add .
exec git commit -m 'Add optional description field'
exec git tag proto/nonbreak/v1/v1.1.0

# Step 3: Verify the new field is present
exec grep 'optional_description' internal/apis/proto/nonbreak/v1/nonbreak.proto

# Step 4: Verify release prepare dry-run succeeds with non-breaking change
exec apx release prepare proto/nonbreak/v1 --canonical-repo=github.com/testorg/nonbreak-test --version=v1.1.0 --dry-run
stdout 'Dry-run mode'
stdout 'v1.1.0'

# Step 5: Verify git history shows evolution
exec git log --oneline
stdout 'Initial schema'
stdout 'Add optional description'

cd ..

# Success: Non-breaking changes validated
# - Adding optional fields is allowed
# - Release prepare dry-run succeeds for non-breaking changes
# - Schema versioning follows semver conventions
